titles.title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to allow a credit against tax for qualified residence interest paid or accrued during the taxable year, and for other purposes.
To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to allow a credit against tax for qualified residence interest paid or accrued during the taxable year, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
